title: 'Uthman' s Alterations to the Pilgrimage Rites
description: According to al-Wagidi-'Umar b. $alih b. Nafi'-$ilil3, the client (mawla) of al-Taw'amah-Ibn 'Abbas: The people first began to talk openly about 'Uthmin [in the following circumstances]. During his reign, he had prayed two rak'ahs with the people at Mina, but in his sixth year he completed (the prayer rites) [with two additional rak'ahs]; more than one of the Prophet's Companions found that blameworthy.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
